# Pull Request

## Change Type

- [ ] RTL functional change
- [ ] RTL cleanup without intended behavior change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Script/tooling
- [ ] Verification/test

## Impact

- Modifies RTL functionality: yes/no
- Affects timing: yes/no/unknown
- Affects correctness: yes/no/unknown
- Affects Vivado project reconstruction: yes/no

## Tests Run

List simulation, synthesis, board, or script checks run.

## Repository Hygiene

- [ ] No generated Vivado files
- [ ] No bitstream, checkpoint, report, waveform, log, or crash dump files
- [ ] No local absolute paths
- [ ] No private user or machine identifiers
- [ ] Memory files are authorized for redistribution, or not included

## Notes

Add any limitations, TODOs, or evidence links.
